hero.headline: Full Stack React & Laravel Developer
hero.headlineAccent: Helping businesses build modern websites and web applications.
hero.subheadline: Full Stack Developer specializing in React, TailwindCSS and Laravel. Based in Vélizy-Villacoublay, France.

about.title: About Me
about.headline: Engineering web systems that turn your visitors into clients
about.desc1: I am Abdennour Bouhounali, a freelance Full Stack Web Developer based in France. I help local and global companies scale by building blazing-fast, beautiful, and results-driven custom web applications.
about.desc2: My development strategy balances rigorous technical architecture with a strong business-growth mindset, ensuring clean codebase expandability and longevity.
about.pillar1Desc: Blazing-fast load speeds reduce visitor drop-offs and directly boost search rankings on Google.
about.pillar2Desc: Every component and interface layout is built to guide visitors seamlessly to purchase forms or call bookings.

services.title: Services
services.headline: Bespoke engineering for digital acceleration
services.desc: From quick prototyping to production scaling, I build high-performance web systems tailored to your needs.

webapp.title: React Web Apps
webapp.desc: Smooth, modern single-page applications built with React and Tailwind CSS for optimized rendering and premium user experience.

ecommerce.title: Laravel E-Commerce
ecommerce.desc: Fast, secure transactional storefronts designed to remove user friction, secure payments, and boost e-commerce sales.

api.title: APIs & Automations
api.desc: Custom backend API services, secure third-party database integrations, and automated workflows to reduce company overhead.

skills.title: Technologies
skills.headline: A production-grade modern stack
skills.desc: I build exclusively with industry-validated open-source tools to ensure maximum speeds, simple maintenance, and high security.

items.react: Powering dynamic, interactive interfaces with fast client-side rendering.
items.tailwindcss: Highly customizable, utility-first styling for clean, responsive UI layouts.
items.laravel: Providing robust logic, routing, security, and clean MVC structure.
items.php: Scalable server-side script engine for enterprise-grade backend infrastructure.
items.javascript: Enabling custom, interactive clients and dynamic behavior.
items.html: Standardized semantic markup structure for accessibility and SEO.
items.css: Custom layout parameters and smooth transition rules.
items.mysql: Structured, transactional data storage to ensure records remain reliable.

projects.title: Case Studies
projects.subtitle: Designed for real-world growth
projects.desc: Bespoke platforms engineered to solve operational bottlenecks and maximize client conversions.

tagemi.title: Global Foundation Platform
tagemi.summary: A highly optimized, accessible web platform built to showcase initiatives and secure support. Engineered using modern frontend performance techniques to load instantly even on limited cellular networks.
tagemi.bullet2: Optimized images for low-bandwidth cellular loading

fisora.title: Conversion-Driven E-Commerce
fisora.summary: A custom storefront backed by a fast transactional system. Eliminates standard checkout bottlenecks, allowing customers to easily filter products, add to cart, and check out securely in a few clicks.

process.title: Roadmap
process.headline: How we take your project from idea to launch
process.desc: A streamlined, transparent development process focused on clarity, updates, and hitting deadlines.

1.title: Discovery Call
1.desc: Defining project objectives, user personas, and scoping features.

2.title: Architecture & Design
2.desc: Mapping wireframes, data structures, and designing high-fidelity layouts.

3.title: Development
3.desc: Writing modular frontend React code and linking it to secure backend Laravel endpoints.

4.title: Launch & Support
4.desc: Testing and optimizing the production release followed by ongoing site support.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.headline: Real feedback from business partners
testimonials.desc: What my clients say about my focus on technical efficiency and business-first solutions.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Clear, upfront answers about my design workflow, technology stacks, and collaborative terms.
faq.a1: We start with a details call to define your goals. Next, I plan the architecture, build the interface on a live staging site, test for bugs and responsiveness, and launch after approval.
faq.q2: Which technologies do you specialize in?
faq.a2: I specialize in React and Tailwind CSS on the frontend, and Laravel paired with MySQL on the backend. This combination ensures optimal speeds and reliable data security.
faq.q3: How long does a typical web application project take?
faq.a3: It varies based on complexity. On average, custom React or Laravel web applications take between 3 to 8 weeks from discovery to official launch.
faq.a4: Yes, all my standard project handovers include 30 days of complimentary technical support to ensure a smooth operational launch.

footer.desc: Full Stack Developer specialized in building custom, high-performance web systems focused on speed, safety, and business return on investment.
